channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:

  2. When 2 million voices met one stage: How Shakira made music history in Copacabana  Yahoo
  3. 🚨🇧🇷 TV Globo says more than 2 million people are at the Shakira concert on Copacabana Beach. Aerial footage barely captures it. Brazil is operating on a different scale... the beach has officially become its own metropolis for the night.  x.com
  4. See Shakira light up Copacabana during massive beach show in Brazil  USA Today
  5. Hits don't lie: Shakira concert draws 2 million fans in Rio  Reuters

  5. Mariners Game #35 Preview and Discussion  Lookout Landing

item.title: Spirit pilot gets ‘overwhelming’ send-off from Southwest after his final flight is cancelled - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Spirit pilot gets ‘overwhelming’ send-off from Southwest after his final flight is cancelled  The Guardian
  2. Spirit Airlines pilot given emotional send-off from rival airline after retirement flight is cut amid shutdown  Yahoo
  3. Southwest honors retiring Spirit pilot at BWI-Marshall amid airline shutdown  WBAL-TV
  4. Retiring Spirit pilot whose final flight was canceled gets tribute from competitor airline  Fox Business
  5. Rival airline honors Spirit pilot whose final flight before retirement was canceled  The Independent

item.title: The Paradox of Medical AI Implementation - Ground Truths | Eric Topol
item.description:
1. The Paradox of Medical AI Implementation  Ground Truths | Eric Topol
  2. AI outperforms doctors in Harvard trial of emergency triage diagnoses  The Guardian
  3. AI Can’t Solve America’s Diagnosis Crisis  New York Magazine
  4. Study Suggests AI Is Good Enough at Diagnosing Complex Medical Cases To Warrant Clinical Testing  Harvard Medical School
  5. In real-world test, an AI model did better than doctors at diagnosing patients  NPR

item.title: Once Detained By ICE, Mariachi Brothers Open for Kacey Musgraves - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Once Detained By ICE, Mariachi Brothers Open for Kacey Musgraves  The New York Times
  2. McAllen mariachi brothers say opening for Kacey Musgraves among biggest performances of careers  KSAT
  3. Kacey Musgraves pushes back on immigration fears, highlights Mexican influence in Texas  Austin American-Statesman
  4. Teen mariachi trio detained by ICE to open for Kacey Musgraves in Texas  The Guardian
